text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho has an incredible Triple Tiara run,
winning the Oka Sho, the Japanese Oaks, and the
Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And in an effort to become the representative of
her generation, she's set out to run in the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup too. However...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm exhausted. Gimme something sweet, Familiar.
choice_data_list: You're not going to call it a day?
You're not going to call it a day?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nope. Studying here is way more convenient.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's a little late, but I know you'll drag me back
before curfew anyway, so it'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Now, come on, Familiar! I need something sweet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm rustling up some sweet snacks for Sweep
Tosho since she's been working hard and racking
her brains over her next race goal, when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Creeeak!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Familiar... What was that noise?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep! Squeeeak! Thunk!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Argh! What's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep, beep!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep, beep, beep, beep!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Eeeek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rush over to where Sweep Tosho is squatting on
the floor. I lean closer to try and identify the
source of the sound...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: My hat?! What's it doing?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The ears on Sweep Tosho's hat are moving in a
bizarre manner.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Grandma... M-my hat's broken...

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Don't you worry, Sweepy. The spell I cast on your
pointy hat has just gone a bit wonky is all!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
I can fix it right up with a touch of magic in my
workshop! Just leave it to me, dearie!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Okay...

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Now then... Let's have a look, shall we? Um,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: Would you like me to show you a little secret?

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: Yes. I do think it'd be best if I showed you.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
I imagine it's all thanks to your dedication that
my little Sweepy's been enjoying racing so much
recently.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Don't you deny it. Her happiness beams right out
of my television set. And I can tell you trust her to
find that racing magic of hers.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
But you must promise not to tell her anything I'm
about to tell you.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: It's about her hat...

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
I made it so that the ears move along with hers
when she's wearing it.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Just like Sweepy, I tend to get quite into
things, you see, and one of those things is
engineering. I picked it up as a hobby.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
So... keep an eye on those ears for me so they
don't get damaged again, okay?

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
The more she applies herself, the more her ears
move, and the more her hat's ears move too.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
But if her ears are moving about so much that the
gears in her hat ears break...
choice_data_list: It means she's working too hard.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. She might be demanding, but she's not
one to show weakness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's how it was when she won the Triple Tiara
too. She never expressed any self-doubt
whatsoever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter who she's up against or what happens
mid-race, she sticks to her running style.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She bides her time at the back and trusts in
herself. She never stops believing that she'll be
able to cast her magic on the whole world...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the moment she crosses the finish line in first,
she smiles as if to say, "See, I did it."

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer. I do hope you'll stay by her side.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: If she's with you, I know she'll be safe.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for casting another spell on my hat,
Grandma!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome! And this time I cast some
multi-layered magic, so it won't break again!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wow! You really are the best witch in the world!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: Since we're all here, let's have some tea!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm gonna have some lemon grass tea! It's
on the shelf like always, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho runs off gleefully, seeming
drastically different from when we first arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I vow to continue watching over her so that she'll
always be able to chase after her magic with that
same skip in her step.
